description:
OL 316 (REV. 7/2020) WWW
Autonomous Mode 
Conventional Mode
Additional information attached.
On September 29th, a test vehicle operating with the automated driving system engaged was traveling Southbound on Highway 101 in San 
Jose when a nearby white Jeep Cherokee ran over a piece of lumber, which was projected onto the test vehicle.  No injuries were reported 
and law enforcement was not called to the scene.  The test vehicle sustained minor damage.
Print
Clear Form
